title: Mindspace Business Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mindspace Business Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
